The '''''G'nabgib''''' was an Imperial [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] used to evacuate the leading [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] and other remaining personnel from a research facility. Part of a convoy that included the ''[[Mharsup]]'' and escorted by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], it was intended to rendezvous with the ''[[Hashim group]]''.

When the convoy was attacked by pirate forces, ''G'nabgib'' was damaged and captured, with its passengers transferred to enemy transport ''[[Ibutho 1]]''. ''G'nabgib'' was eventually repaired and able to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
